scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:sun-backend"
scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend && npm run build:sun-backend
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:frontend" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:sun-backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install && cd ../sun-backend && npm install
